[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 100110110 5
6 010000000 1
7 000101100 3

01 100111110 6
12 010000000 1 match 6
23 000001001 2
34 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
